title: Ikizamini "Leben in Deutschland": Ibibazo 310 Vyahinduwe mu Kirundi
description: Ikizamini c'ubwenegihugu bw'Ubudagi "Leben in Deutschland": ibibazo 310 mu ndimi 100+. Witegure mu Kirundi — ku buntu kandi nta internet.
h1: Ikizamini c'ubwenegihugu — mu rurimi rwawe kavukire
hero_sub: Ibibazo 310 vyose vy'ikizamini "Leben in Deutschland", vyahinduwe mu Kirundi. Iga utabanje gukomerwa, ku rwego rwawe bwite, nta internet ikenewe.
hero_note: Ku buntu · Ikora nta internet · Ibibazo vy'intara zose 16
hero_img_alt: Urupapuro rw'itangiriro rw'isengesho mu Kirundi: ibibazo vyose, ibibazo vy'intara, ivyatoranijwe, imibare
lang_p1: Ikibazo cose kigaragazwa mu Gidagi — nk'uko biri mu kizamini nyakuri — hamwe n'ihindurwa mu Kirundi munsi gato. Wiga ivyigwa hamwe n'amajambo nyakuri uzobona mu kizamini.
lang_p2: Iyi sengesho itanga amahinduriro mu ndimi zirenga 100 — igihambaye ni uko urwawe rumaze kuhaba.
demo_t: Mu Budagi, abantu baremerewe kunegura leta ku mugaragaro kubera …
demo_caption: Ikibazo ca 1 kuri 310 · nyegeza ihindurwa ukoresheje ugukanda rimwe
feat_h2: Ivyo ukeneye vyose kugira witegure — mu sengesho imwe
feat_lede: Amakarata nyene nk'ari mu sengesho: yoroshe, atomoye, nta n'ikindi.
feat1_p: Ibibazo 300 rusangi hamwe n'ibibazo 10 vy'intara yawe — urutonde rwuzuye rwemewe.
feat2_p: Ikizamini c'imyimenyerezo: ibibazo 33 n'umwanya w'iminota 60 — amategeko nyene nk'ay'ikizamini cemewe.
feat3_p: Inyuma y'inyishu yose ubona ako kanya ko yari iyukuri canke iyabesha — wiga uriko uragenda.
feat4_p: Uburyo bwihariye bufise gusa ibibazo wishuye nabi — uzibe amasumo yawe neza.
feat5_p: Shira inyenyeri ku bibazo usanga bigoye uce ugaruka kuri vyo igihe cose ushatse.
feat6_p: Wige mu metero, mu murongo, aho ariho hose — nta internet na mba ikenewe.
scr_lede: Imbonankubone iri mu Kirundi. Ishusho ituje, yoroshe, nta n'ikindi.
scr1_alt: Urupapuro rw'ikibazo rufise inyishu zahinduwe mu Kirundi
scr2_alt: Ikibazo gifise ifoto: inzu rusangi ya Bundestag
scr2_cap: Ibibazo vy'amashusho — nk'uko biri mu kizamini
how_lede: Kuva ku kwinjiza gushika ku kuba witeguriye ikizamini.
step1_p: Injiza ku buntu, hitamwo Ikirundi n'intara yawe.
step2_p: Soma ibibazo bifise amahinduriro, shira inyenyeri ku bigoye uce usubiramwo amakosa yawe.
step3_p: Igerageze mu buryo bw'ikizamini — uce winjira mu kizamini nyakuri wizigiye.
final_lede: Ku buntu. Mu Kirundi. Bikora nta internet.
disc1_p: Uyu ni umushinga w'inyigisho wihariye, atari isengesho yemewe y'Ibiro vya Federali bijejwe Abimukira n'Impunzi (BAMF). Iyi sengesho ntifise isano n'inzego za leta na zimwe kandi ntiserukira inzego zemewe na zimwe.
disc2_p: Ibibazo vy'ikizamini bishingiye ku rutonde rw'ibibazo rwemewe rwa BAMF. Ivyanditswe vy'umwimerere bisohorwa mu Gidagi mu ikigo c'ibizamini kuri internet ca BAMF.
disc3_p: Amahinduriro yakozwe n'ubwenge bw'ubuhinga (AI) kugira afashe abakoresha bafise ubumenyi buke bw'Igidagi kandi ashobora kuba afise amakosa. Niwumva ihindurwa rikeneye guteza imbere, urashobora kumenyesha umuhinguzi uciye mu sengesho. Ni igisomwa c'umwimerere mu Gidagi gusa kigira ububasha.
disc4_p: Ibikubiyemwo vy'iyi sengesho bigenewe gusa kwitegura ikizamini. Naho twiteguye twitonze, ntidushobora kwemeza ko amakuru ari ukuri, yuzuye canke ari ay'igihe; uburyozwe bwose ku gihombo kiziye ku buryo butaziguye canke buziguye buva ku gukoresha iyi sengesho buravanyweko. Ni ibikoresho vyemewe vya BAMF gusa bigira ububasha.
f_about: Kwitegura ikizamini "Leben in Deutschland" (Einbürgerungstest) mu rurimi rwawe kavukire. Isengesho ya 85apps.
